name: Mexicali Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 cups elbow macaroni, cooked and drained
15 ounces dark red kidney beans, undrained
1/4 cup skim milk, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Prepare a 2-quart casserole dish with cooking spray; set aside.
3. In a skillet, heat oil over medium heat.
4. Add turkey, onions, and bell peppers. Cook until turkey is no longer pink and vegetables are tender.
5. Stir in taco seasoning mix, dark red kidney beans, and tomato sauce. Reduce heat and simmer, uncovered for 5 minutes; set aside.
6. Return hot macaroni to saucepan. Stir in milk and 2 cups cheddar cheese.
7. Layer half the macaroni and half of the turkey mixture in the prepared pan.
8. Repeat layers.
9. Bake, uncovered, for 20 minutes or until heated through.
10. Top with remaining cheddar cheese. Bake, uncovered again, for 3 minutes or until cheese has melted.
